title: Boosted Brightness
description: Multiples the brightness setting by 10x which allows for fullbright. Uses the new 1.21.2 lightmap core shader meaning it works with Sodium.
body:
This resourcepack uses the new lightmap shader introduced in 1.21.2 snapshots to increase the brightness without any mods. You can control the brightness with your in game brightness slider!


This works in Vanilla minecraft and with Sodium. No mods required.


_You may run into issues when using shaders_

If you want to use this with my other pack that [fixes night vision in 1.21.9-1.21.11](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/night-vision-fix),
go to the 1.21.9-1.21.11 version in the versions tab and click the download button underneath the main one that says "Boosted Brightness NV Fix" or click [here](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/hykOznvB/versions/mVPzPvIm/Boosted%20Brightness%20NV%20Fix.zip)

## Brightness 10 (This is the vanilla max without this resourcepack):
